title: 新岛铁道
description: A Modpack focused on building railways with Create Mod Trains. 机械动力・铁道相关整合包。加群549428882
body: Build and automate your own railway with Create mod trains. Steam & Rails, Pantographs & Wires, and other decorative mods add realistic train interior blocks and overhead lines; Railways Navigator and Train Utilities handle routing and ops. Other decor packs flesh out stations. Necessary performance/QoL mods included.
